displayName.description:
Display name of the application for the UI.
Falls back to App ID if not given.

allowMultipleInstances.description: Whether multiple instances of the application can be installed. Defaults to true.

category.description:
1 or more categories for this application. Categories are used to group applications in the UI.
Defaults to [general].

description.description: Short description, should be a sentence or two, displayed in the UI on the application card.

dependencies.description:
List of applications that should be installed in order for the application to function properly.
The UI will not block the installation of the application if the dependencies are not installed.

requiredDependencies.description: List of applications that are required to be installed in order for the application to be enabled in the UI.

k8sVersionSupport.description: A string indicating the compatible Kubernetes version or range.

icon.description: Base64 encoded icon SVG file used for application logos in the UI.

nkpVersionSupport.description: A string indicating the compatible NKP version or range.

overview.description: Markdown overview used on the application detail page in the UI.

supportLink.description: A link to the support page.

scope.description: List of scopes, can be set only to project and/or workspace. Defaults to project.

upgradesFrom.description: A string indicating the version or range of versions that the application can be upgraded from.

licensing.description:
Cluster must have one of these licenses applied in order for the application to be installable.
Defaults to [Pro, Ultimate].

certifications.description: List of certifications that the application has.
